name: Said Souada
message:
Finance and Accounting Process Specialist with 4+ years of experience in Ship to Cash
(StC) in multinational companies, maintaining SLA performance above 95%. Skilled in
dispute management, customer escalations (including VIP cases), invoice and credit note
processing, and data validation. Experienced in supporting process improvements,
onboarding new team members, and maintaining high customer service standards.
Familiar with ERP systems such as PeopleSoft and Salesforce
